data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a strong replenishment of the northeast monsoon, the weather will be dry over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days, and it will be cool in the morning. With the monsoon moderating, temperatures will rise gradually over the region and it will be warm during the day early to midweek next week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Nuri will move eastwards across the western North Pacific and dissipate gradually today and tomorrow.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260313","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"East force 5, occasionally force 6 offshore and on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.
